basics.name: Raj Suryawanshi
basics.title: Red Team Analyst | Penetration Tester | Ethical Hacker
basics.summary: Certified Red Team Analyst (CRTA), Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH), and Certified Red Hat Enterprise Linux (CRHEL) professional with hands-on experience in Red Team operations, web application penetration testing, vulnerability assessment, and exploitation of security weaknesses in live production environments. Strong expertise in Active Directory attacks, privilege escalation, post-exploitation, and OWASP Top 10 vulnerability assessment. Skilled in conducting full VAPT lifecycle including reconnaissance, exploitation, reporting, and remediation guidance aligned with MITRE ATT&CK framework.

bullets: Conducted web application penetration testing on live production and staging environments.
Identified vulnerabilities including SQL Injection, Cross-Site Scripting (XSS), IDOR, LFI, and misconfigurations.
Performed manual testing and automated vulnerability scanning.
Provided detailed vulnerability reports including CVSS scoring and remediation steps.
Simulated attacker techniques aligned with MITRE ATT&CK framework.
Performed Active Directory enumeration using BloodHound.
Executed credential harvesting and password spraying attacks.
Conducted local and remote privilege escalation.
Simulated lateral movement using Pass-the-Hash techniques.
Tested persistence mechanisms in controlled lab environments.

achievements.title: Critical Vulnerabilities
achievements.context: Successfully identified critical security vulnerabilities in live applications.

achievements.title: Efficiency Improvement
achievements.context: Improved vulnerability detection efficiency through custom automation scripts.

achievements.title: Real-world Simulation
achievements.context: Practiced real-world attack simulation through Hack The Box and TryHackMe labs.

projects.title: Domain Vulnerability Scanner (Automated Security Tool)
bullets: Designed and developed a Python-based domain vulnerability scanning tool.
Integrated subdomain enumeration, port scanning, and HTTP response analysis.
Automated detection of OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities.
Generated structured vulnerability reports for remediation.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering - BE, Computer Engineering

extra: Training & Lab Experience: Hack The Box – Red Team Labs
Training & Lab Experience: TryHackMe – Red Team Path
Training & Lab Experience: Active Directory Attack Simulation Labs
Training & Lab Experience: CVE Exploitation Practice
